message:
fix: replace pgrep/ps string matching with lsof port-based discovery in health checks (gt-fj87)

Health check functions (checkProcessHealth, findVitalsZombies, FindZombieServers,
CountDoltServers, StopAllDoltServers) used pgrep -f "dolt sql-server" + ps -p PID
string matching to discover processes. This violates ZFC (Zero Fragile Coupling) by
coupling process identity to command-line string heuristics.

Replace with lsof -c dolt -sTCP:LISTEN for binary-name + port-based discovery:
- Add FindAllDoltListeners() to doltserver package (lsof -F pn parsing)
- health.FindZombieServers: filter listeners by expected ports
- cmd/health.go checkProcessHealth: delegate to health.FindZombieServers
- cmd/vitals.go findVitalsZombies: use doltserver.FindAllDoltListeners
- daemon/dolt.go CountDoltServers: count via FindAllDoltListeners
- daemon/dolt.go StopAllDoltServers: direct signal delivery to discovered PIDs
